full_text:
Yuan Xi (Xianyi) 袁熙 (顯奕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Xi (袁熙), styledXianyi (顯奕), was born in Runan. Eventually took in Shang, driven out by revolt. Executed by Gongsun Kang. Yuan Xi was affiliated with Yuan Shao and Yuan Shang. Yuan Xi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
